programs.title: Deadly Dispatch
programs.desc: After her best friend IS tragically murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong, Tiffany Jackson takes justice in her own hands to find his killer.

programs.title: Safe Room
programs.desc: After Ian accidentally witnesses a break-in in the house across the street and records the horrific murder of the homeowner, Lila becomes embroiled in a deadly struggle to protect her son.

programs.title: When Love Kills: The Falicia Blakely Story
programs.desc: All Falicia ever wanted was a better life and she found it with Dino.  He promised her the world and all she had to do for it was to kill.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When an Atlanta rapper on the verge of stardom is shot dead, evidence on the scene seems to point to a straightforward case of self-defense. But is everything as it seems? Soon detectives will find the rapper’s final recording, which reveals the shocking truth behind the horrific events leading to his death.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.sub_title: Fatal Attraction - Thou Shalt Not Kill
programs.desc: After a brilliant, beautiful college student goes missing, the case takes one shocking turn after another. Soon detectives are investigating a scandalous alleged affair with a pastor, but will it be the affair itself or the jealousy it caused that will lead detectives to her killer

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: After years of putting others first, a caring woman finds new love in an unlikely place. Then one day she disappears, and rumors begin circulating. But as everything unravels, a shocking claim is offered up, which turns the investigation on its head.
